name: INTELLINETICS, INC.
summary: Intellinetics, Inc. is a Nevada holding company operating through two subsidiaries: Intellinetics Ohio and Graphic Sciences. The company provides document services and software solutions for digital transformation and process automation, serving small-to-medium businesses and governmental sectors. Key products include IntelliCloud Payables Automation, IntelliCloud content management, and YellowFolder for K-12 education. Services include digital scanning, micrographics conversion, BPO, and physical document storage, sold via direct sales and channel partners.

products.name: IntelliCloud Payables Automation Solutions
products.description: Cloud-based accounts payable lifecycle automation including advanced capture for invoice processing.

products.name: IntelliCloud Content Management
products.description: Cloud-based content management platform for capturing and managing documents, images, audio, video, and emails.

products.name: YellowFolder
products.description: Specialized cloud-based content management software solution for the K-12 education market.

products.name: Digital Scanning Services
products.description: Paper, newspaper, aperture card, drawing, book, and large format scanning services for businesses and governments.

products.name: Business Process Outsourcing (BPO)
products.description: Ongoing outsourcing of customer mailroom processes including mail pickup, sorting, scanning, and upload.

products.name: Micrographics Services
products.description: Microfilm/microfiche conversion to digital, preservation, and duplication services.

products.name: Box Storage Services
products.description: Physical document storage and retrieval services for clients.

partnerships.description: Third-party cloud infrastructure provider hosting Intellinetics SaaS products.
Integration with Microsoft Office 365 for document capture and management.
Channel partners used for indirect sales of software and document services.
